name: Vegetarian Chili (Hawk)
recipeIngredient: 1 can Refried beans (watch out for lard)
recipeInstructions:
1. Bring water to a boil.
2. Add onion and cook on medium heat until fairly transparent.
3. Reduce the heat to low.
4. Add the remaining ingredients.
5. Stir until the beans are smooth and heated for about one minute or two.
I ate it with a dollop of sour cream and some raw diced onion, but it is good without any garnish at all. I hope you like it.
